a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: When will countries phase out coal power?
This measures pledges to phase out coal from the electricity mix.
Note: Where a concrete phase out date is not defined, we have allocated the final year of the target decade. For example, "Phase out in the
2040s" is given a target date of 2049.
